member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.DatabaseConfiguration
member.summary: Root configuration for CL.MySQL2. Serialized to / from config.mysql.json in the library's config directory.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.DatabaseConfiguration.Databases
member.summary: Named database configurations keyed by connection ID.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.DatabaseConfiguration.Validate
member.summary: Validates all configured databases.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig
member.summary: Per-database MySQL connection settings.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this database connection is active.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Host
member.summary: MySQL server hostname or IP address.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Port
member.summary: MySQL server port. Default: 3306.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Database
member.summary: Database (schema) name.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Username
member.summary: MySQL username.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Password
member.summary: MySQL password.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.EnablePooling
member.summary: Whether connection pooling is enabled. Default: true.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.MinPoolSize
member.summary: Minimum number of pooled connections. Default: 1.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.MaxPoolSize
member.summary: Maximum number of pooled connections. Default: 100.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.ConnectionLifetime
member.summary: Maximum connection lifetime in seconds. Default: 300.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.ConnectionTimeout
member.summary: Connection timeout in seconds. Default: 30.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.CommandTimeout
member.summary: Command timeout in seconds. Default: 30.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.EnableSsl
member.summary: Whether to require SSL/TLS for connections. Default: false.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.SslCertificatePath
member.summary: Path to a client SSL certificate file. Optional.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.AllowPublicKeyRetrieval
member.summary: Whether to allow servers without RSA public key. Default: false.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.CharacterSet
member.summary: Connection character set. Default: "utf8mb4".

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Collation
member.summary: Default collation. Default: "utf8mb4_unicode_ci".

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.AllowDestructiveSync
member.summary: When false (default), the table sync will never DROP or TRUNCATE existing data. Set to true only in development environments.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.BackupDirectory
member.summary: Directory for schema backup files. Null = DataDirectory/backups.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.SlowQueryThresholdMs
member.summary: Queries exceeding this threshold (ms) are logged as slow queries. Default: 1000.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.BuildConnectionString
member.summary: Builds and returns the MySqlConnector connection string from the current configuration.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig.Validate
member.summary: Validates the per-database configuration.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Core.MySqlExpressionVisitor
member.summary: Translates LINQ lambda expressions into MySQL WHERE clause fragments and parameter dictionaries. Supports binary comparisons, logical operators, method calls (Contains, StartsWith, EndsWith), and null checks.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.MySqlExpressionVisitor.Translate``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Boolean}},System.String)
member.summary: Translates the body of a predicate lambda into a SQL WHERE fragment.
member.param: Optional table alias prefix for column references.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.MySqlExpressionVisitor.TranslateSelector``2(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,``1}})
member.summary: Translates a member selector lambda into a column name string.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Core.SchemaAnalyzer
member.summary: Analyzes entity types and generates the DDL statements required to create or alter the corresponding MySQL table so it matches the current class definition.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.SchemaAnalyzer.GetTableName(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns the table name for the given entity type.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.SchemaAnalyzer.GenerateCreateTable(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statement for the given entity type.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.SchemaAnalyzer.GenerateAlterStatementsAsync(System.Type,MySqlConnector.MySqlConnection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compares the entity type definition against the live database schema and returns a list of ALTER TABLE statements needed to bring the table in sync.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Core.TypeConverter
member.summary: Converts between MySQL/CLR types and generates DDL type strings from metadata.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.TypeConverter.GetMySqlType(CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute)
member.summary: Returns the MySQL DDL type string for the given column attribute (e.g., "VARCHAR(255)", "DECIMAL(10,2)").

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.TypeConverter.ToDbValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts a CLR value to a form suitable for use as a MySqlConnector parameter value. Handles enums, nullable types, and MySqlDateTime.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.TypeConverter.FromDbValue(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Converts a database value read from a MySqlDataReader to the target CLR type. Handles DBNull, enums, and MySqlDateTime.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Core.TypeConverter.InferDataType(System.Type)
member.summary: Infers the best-matching for a CLR type. Used when reflecting entity properties without explicit .

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Events.DatabaseConnectedEvent
member.summary: Published when a MySQL connection is successfully opened.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Events.DatabaseConnectedEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Published when a MySQL connection is successfully opened.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Events.DatabaseDisconnectedEvent
member.summary: Published when a MySQL connection is closed.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Events.DatabaseDisconnectedEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Published when a MySQL connection is closed.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Events.TableSyncedEvent
member.summary: Published after a table is synchronized (created or altered).

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Events.TableSyncedEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Published after a table is synchronized (created or altered).

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Events.SlowQueryEvent
member.summary: Published when a query exceeds the configured slow-query threshold.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Events.SlowQueryEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Published when a query exceeds the configured slow-query threshold.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Events.HealthChangedEvent
member.summary: Published when the library's health state changes.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Events.HealthChangedEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Published when the library's health state changes.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Localization.MySQL2Strings
member.summary: Localized strings for the CL.MySQL2 library. Serialized to / from mysql.{culture}.json in the library's localization directory.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.TableAttribute
member.summary: Marks a class as a database table entity. Apply to a class to enable table sync and repository operations.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.TableAttribute.Name
member.summary: Custom table name. Defaults to the class name if null.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.TableAttribute.Engine
member.summary: MySQL storage engine. Default: InnoDB.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.TableAttribute.Charset
member.summary: Table character set. Default: utf8mb4.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.TableAttribute.Collation
member.summary: Table collation (e.g., "utf8mb4_unicode_ci"). Optional.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.TableAttribute.Comment
member.summary: Table comment. Optional.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute
member.summary: Maps a property to a database column with optional schema metadata.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Name
member.summary: Custom column name. Defaults to the property name if null.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.DataType
member.summary: MySQL data type for the column.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Size
member.summary: Column size / length (e.g., 255 for VARCHAR(255)). 0 = type default.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Precision
member.summary: Numeric precision (for DECIMAL columns). Default: 10.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Scale
member.summary: Numeric scale (decimal places, for DECIMAL columns). Default: 2.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Primary
member.summary: Whether this column is the primary key.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.AutoIncrement
member.summary: Whether this column uses AUTO_INCREMENT.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.NotNull
member.summary: Whether this column has a NOT NULL constraint.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Unique
member.summary: Whether this column has a UNIQUE constraint.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Index
member.summary: Whether this column has a plain INDEX.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.DefaultValue
member.summary: Default value expression (e.g., "0", "'active'", "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP").

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Charset
member.summary: Column-level character set override (for string types). Optional.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Comment
member.summary: Column comment. Optional.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.Unsigned
member.summary: Whether this column is UNSIGNED (for numeric types).

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ColumnAttribute.OnUpdateCurrentTimestamp
member.summary: Whether to add ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (for TIMESTAMP/DATETIME).

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAttribute
member.summary: Declares a foreign key constraint on a column property.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAttribute.ReferenceTable
member.summary: The referenced table name. Required.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAttribute.ReferenceColumn
member.summary: The referenced column name. Required.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAttribute.OnDelete
member.summary: Action when the referenced row is deleted. Default: Restrict.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAttribute.OnUpdate
member.summary: Action when the referenced row is updated. Default: Restrict.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAttribute.ConstraintName
member.summary: Custom constraint name. Auto-generated if null.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Declares a foreign key to the specified table and column.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.ForeignKeyAction
member.summary: Referential action for ON DELETE / ON UPDATE foreign key clauses.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.IgnoreAttribute
member.summary: Excludes a property from all database operations (read, write, schema sync).

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.CompositeIndexAttribute
member.summary: Declares a composite index spanning multiple columns. Apply to the class (not a single property) by using the index column names. Can be applied multiple times for multiple composite indexes.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.CompositeIndexAttribute.IndexName
member.summary: The index name (must be unique within the table).

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.CompositeIndexAttribute.ColumnNames
member.summary: The column names included in this index.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.CompositeIndexAttribute.Unique
member.summary: Whether this is a unique index. Default: false.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Models.CompositeIndexAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Declares a composite index with the given name covering the specified columns.
member.param: One or more column names to include.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.ManyToManyAttribute
member.summary: Marks a property as a many-to-many navigation property resolved via a junction table entity.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.ManyToManyAttribute.JunctionEntityType
member.summary: The CLR type of the junction table entity.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Models.ManyToManyAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Declares a many-to-many relationship via the specified junction entity type.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.DataType
member.summary: MySQL column data types.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.TableEngine
member.summary: MySQL storage engine options.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.Charset
member.summary: MySQL character set options.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.SortOrder
member.summary: Sort order for query results.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.OperationType
member.summary: Type of DML operation performed on a record.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Represents a page of results from a paged query.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1.Items
member.summary: The items on the current page.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1.PageNumber
member.summary: The 1-based page number.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1.PageSize
member.summary: The maximum number of items per page.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1.TotalItems
member.summary: Total number of items across all pages.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: True when there is a page before this one.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.PagedResult`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: True when there is a page after this one.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.WhereCondition
member.summary: A single WHERE predicate clause for use in dynamic queries.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.WhereCondition.Column
member.summary: The column name to filter on. Required.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.WhereCondition.Operator
member.summary: Comparison operator (e.g., "=", "!=", ">", "LIKE"). Default: "=".

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.WhereCondition.Value
member.summary: The value to compare against.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.WhereCondition.LogicalOperator
member.summary: Logical connector to the previous clause ("AND" or "OR"). Default: "AND".

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.OrderByClause
member.summary: Specifies an ORDER BY clause for a query.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.OrderByClause.Column
member.summary: The column to sort by. Required.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.OrderByClause.Order
member.summary: Sort direction. Default: Asc.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.JoinClause
member.summary: Specifies a JOIN clause for a query.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.JoinClause.Type
member.summary: The JOIN type. Default: Inner.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.JoinClause.Table
member.summary: The table to join. Required.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.JoinClause.Condition
member.summary: The ON condition (e.g., "a.id = b.a_id"). Required.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.JoinType
member.summary: SQL JOIN types.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.AggregateFunction
member.summary: Describes a SQL aggregate function applied to a column.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.AggregateFunction.Type
member.summary: The aggregate type (COUNT, SUM, etc.).

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.AggregateFunction.Column
member.summary: The column the function is applied to. Required.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.AggregateFunction.Alias
member.summary: The alias for the result column. Required.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.AggregateType
member.summary: SQL aggregate function types.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Models.SyncResult
member.summary: The result of a table synchronization operation.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.SyncResult.Success
member.summary: Whether the sync completed without errors.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.SyncResult.TableName
member.summary: The name of the table that was synced.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.SyncResult.Operations
member.summary: DDL operations performed (e.g., "CREATE TABLE", "ADD COLUMN x").

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.SyncResult.Errors
member.summary: Any non-fatal errors encountered during the sync.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Models.SyncResult.Duration
member.summary: How long the sync took.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library
member.summary:
CL.MySQL2 — CodeLogic library providing MySQL database access with a fluent LINQ query builder, automatic table synchronization, migrations, schema backups, and multiple named database connections.
Lifecycle:
Configure — Registers and .
Initialize — Loads config, validates, creates and . Tests the connection.
Start — Runs a health check and logs server version.
Stop — Closes connections and disposes resources.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.ConnectionManager
member.summary: Returns the .
member.exception: Thrown when the library is not initialized or disabled.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.TableSync
member.summary: Returns the .
member.exception: Thrown when the library is not initialized or disabled.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.MigrationTracker
member.summary: Returns the .

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.BackupManager
member.summary: Returns the .

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.GetRepository``1(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a for the given entity type.
member.param: The connection ID to use. Default: "Default".

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.Query``1(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a fluent for the given entity type.
member.param: The connection ID to use. Default: "Default".

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.BeginTransactionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction and returns a .

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.SyncTableAsync``1(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Syncs the table schema for the specified entity type.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.MySQL2Library.TestConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests the MySQL connection for the given connection ID.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.BackupManager
member.summary: Creates and manages schema backup files for MySQL tables and databases. Backups contain DDL (CREATE TABLE statements) and are stored as .sql files.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.BackupManager.BackupTableSchemaAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Backs up the CREATE TABLE DDL for the specified table to a timestamped .sql file.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.BackupManager.BackupDatabaseSchemaAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Backs up the DDL for all tables in the current database.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.BackupManager.CleanupOldBackupsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes backup files older than the specified number of days.
member.param: Files older than this many days will be deleted.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager
member.summary: Manages MySQL database connections — registration, pooling, health checking, and transaction orchestration for multiple named connection IDs.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.#ctor(CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger,CodeLogic.Core.Events.IEventBus)
member.summary: Creates a ConnectionManager.
member.param: Optional event bus for publishing connection events.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.RegisterConfiguration(CL.MySQL2.Configuration.MySqlDatabaseConfig,System.String)
member.summary: Registers (or replaces) a connection configuration under a given ID.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.GetConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the configuration for the given connection ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.HasConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when a configuration exists for the given connection ID.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.GetConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the ADO.NET connection string for the given connection ID.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.OpenConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens and returns a new for the given connection ID. Publishes a on success.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.CloseConnectionAsync(MySqlConnector.MySqlConnection)
member.summary: Closes the connection and publishes a .

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.TestConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests connectivity for the given connection ID. Returns true on success, false on failure (does not throw).

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.ExecuteWithConnectionAsync``1(System.Func{MySqlConnector.MySqlConnection,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a connection, executes the given action, closes the connection, and returns the result.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.ExecuteWithTransactionAsync``1(System.Func{MySqlConnector.MySqlConnection,MySqlConnector.MySqlTransaction,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a connection, begins a transaction, executes the action, commits, and returns the result. Rolls back automatically on exception.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.GetServerInfoAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves version and database metadata from the MySQL server.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.GetOpenConnectionCount(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the current open connection count for the given connection ID.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.GetAllConnectionCounts
member.summary: Returns a snapshot of open connection counts for all registered IDs.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager.GetConnectionIds
member.summary: Returns the registered connection IDs.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.ServerInfo
member.summary: Basic MySQL server metadata.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.ServerInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Basic MySQL server metadata.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationTracker
member.summary: Tracks applied database migrations in a dedicated __migrations table. Supports recording migrations and querying applied history.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationTracker.EnsureMigrationsTableAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ensures the migrations tracking table exists. Should be called once during library initialization.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationTracker.HasMigrationBeenAppliedAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true when the migration with the given ID has already been applied.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationTracker.RecordMigrationAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records a successfully applied migration.
member.param: Optional checksum of the migration script.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationTracker.GetAppliedMigrationsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the list of all applied migration records, ordered by application date.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationTracker.RemoveMigrationRecordAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a migration record (e.g., for rollback purposes).

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationRecord
member.summary: Represents a single applied migration record from the tracking table.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.MigrationRecord.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a single applied migration record from the tracking table.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.QueryBuilder`1
member.summary: Fluent query builder for entity type . Chains WHERE, ORDER BY, JOIN, GROUP BY, LIMIT/OFFSET clauses and executes terminal operations returning .

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1
member.summary: Generic repository providing CRUD and query operations for entity type . Uses reflection with a static per-type cache for performance.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.#ctor(CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a repository using the given connection manager and connection ID.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.#ctor(CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger,CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a repository that participates in an existing transaction scope.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.InsertAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts a single entity and returns the inserted entity (with auto-generated ID if applicable).

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.InsertManyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk-inserts a collection of entities and returns the count inserted.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.GetByIdAsync(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an entity by its primary key value.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.GetByColumnAsync(System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all entities where the specified column equals the given value.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.GetAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all entities in the table.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.GetPagedAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a paged result set.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.CountAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the total row count for the table.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.UpdateAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing entity and returns the updated entity.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.DeleteAsync(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an entity by its primary key value.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.IncrementAsync``1(System.Object,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Atomically increments a numeric property by the given amount.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.DecrementAsync``1(System.Object,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}},``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Atomically decrements a numeric property by the given amount.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.Repository`1.FindAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all entities matching the given LINQ predicate.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.TableSyncService
member.summary: Synchronizes database table schema with entity class definitions. Uses to detect and apply CREATE/ALTER TABLE statements.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TableSyncService.#ctor(CL.MySQL2.Services.ConnectionManager,System.String,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger,CodeLogic.Core.Events.IEventBus)
member.param: The connection manager to use for database access.
Base data directory (for backup and migration storage).
Optional event bus for publishing sync events.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TableSyncService.SyncTableAsync``1(System.Boolean,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Synchronizes the table schema for entity type . Creates the table if it doesn't exist, or alters it to add missing columns/indexes.
member.param: Whether to back up the current schema before making changes.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TableSyncService.SyncTablesAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Type},System.Boolean,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Synchronizes multiple entity types and returns a dictionary of results.
member.param: Whether to back up schemas before altering.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TableSyncService.GetMigrationTracker
member.summary: Returns the used by this service.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TableSyncService.GetBackupManager
member.summary: Returns the used by this service.

member.name: T:CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope
member.summary: Wraps a with an async-disposable pattern. When disposed without an explicit or call, the transaction is automatically rolled back.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope.ConnectionId
member.summary: The connection ID this transaction belongs to.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope.Connection
member.summary: The underlying database connection.

member.name: P:CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope.Transaction
member.summary: The underlying database transaction.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope.CommitAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the transaction.
member.exception: Thrown if already committed or rolled back.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope.RollbackAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rolls back the transaction explicitly.
member.exception: Thrown if already committed or rolled back.

member.name: M:CL.MySQL2.Services.TransactionScope.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Disposes the transaction. Automatically rolls back if not already committed/rolled back.
